hero.description: I help businesses grow their digital presence and improve visibility through effective marketing strategies. My goal is to create relevant and engaging content while implementing actions that strengthen brand image and foster better interaction with the online community.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who am I?
about.intro: Passionate about digital marketing, I use my creativity and expertise to help businesses strengthen their online visibility. Each project is an opportunity to transform an idea into a dynamic digital strategy capable of capturing attention and creating a real connection with audiences.
about.point1: Designing digital strategies tailored to brand needs.
about.point2: Creating engaging visual and video content for social media.
about.point3: Managing communities to strengthen interaction and loyalty.
about.point4: Analyzing performance to measure impact and optimize campaigns.
about.goal: My goal is to support businesses in their growth by offering modern, effective and sustainable solutions.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.intro:
Passionate about digital marketing, I have progressively built a rich and diverse expertise,
developing strong skills in strategy, content creation and performance analysis,
which today allow me to support businesses in managing their online presence effectively, consistently and sustainably.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.intro: My journey in digital marketing has allowed me to create a wide range of creative projects, including visuals, posters, flyers, logos and social media content, with the constant goal of helping both businesses and individuals communicate effectively and enhance their identity.

africanada.title: AFRICANADA Social Media Management
africanada.description: Complete social media management: visual content creation, post scheduling, and community engagement.
africanada.descriptionLong: Full management of AFRICANADA’s social media: design of visuals, writing posts, editorial calendar, daily community engagement, and performance tracking. Coordination of promotional campaigns and adaptation of content based on user feedback.
africanada.results: Increased engagement, improved visibility, and stronger customer interactions.
africanada.impact: Strengthened brand image and enhanced community loyalty online.

wonder.title: Digital Marketing – CB WONDER Enterprise
wonder.description: Participation in digital marketing: visuals, competitive analysis, web design, and email campaigns.
wonder.descriptionLong: Creation of visuals, competitive analysis, basic web integration, and targeted email campaigns.
wonder.results: Improved digital presence and optimized content.
wonder.impact: Direct contribution to the company’s visibility and improved consistency of marketing campaigns.

horizon.title: Logo Proposals – HORIZON
horizon.description: Creation of several modern and minimalist logo variations.
horizon.descriptionLong: Design of multiple graphic proposals to modernize the visual identity.
horizon.results: Several options delivered to the client.

onglerie.title: Premium Nail Salon Poster
onglerie.description: Elegant poster promoting the salon’s services.
onglerie.descriptionLong: High-end visual design aimed at a feminine audience to reinforce the salon’s premium image.
onglerie.impact: Positioned the salon as a local reference.

import.title: Import‑Export China Flyer
import.descriptionLong: Design of a flyer showcasing reliability, speed and security of import‑export services.
import.results: Effective marketing material attracting new clients.

gems.title: Gems Immo Flyer
gems.descriptionLong: Design of a flyer highlighting transparency, availability and importance of on‑site visits.

multiservices.title: Multi‑Service Entrepreneur Poster
multiservices.descriptionLong: Poster presenting administrative assistance, graphic design, copywriting and web content.
multiservices.results: Effective marketing support promoting all services.

concours.title: Contest Poster – Two Candidates
concours.descriptionLong: Poster highlighting photos, background and skills of the candidates.
concours.results: Improved visibility with the jury and public.

beaute.title: Beauty Care Flyer
beaute.description: Professional flyer for beauty and wellness services.
beaute.descriptionLong: Elegant and soothing flyer design with premium visuals.
beaute.results: More appointments and stronger local reputation.

carte.title: Business Card
carte.descriptionLong: Vector file and color variations for printing.

transit.title: FN Transit Flyer
transit.description: Promotional flyer for an import and transit company.
transit.descriptionLong: Design of a clear and engaging visual highlighting FN Transit’s international transport services. The flyer presents destinations, pricing, and contact details in a professional and accessible way.
transit.results: Used by the client to promote services to prospects and partners.
transit.impact: Enhanced visibility and strengthened credibility with potential customers.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.intro: Do you have a project, a question or a collaboration in mind? Feel free to contact me via the form or directly by phone or email. I am available to discuss and respond quickly.
